criteria.name: cta_labels_specific

criteria.name: marketing_copy_spelling_grammar

criteria.name: noma_terminology_consistent

criteria.name: pricing_tiers_exact_formatting

criteria.name: hero_and_nav_copy_exact

criteria.name: marquee_phrases_exact

criteria.name: inquiry_and_shortlist_copy_exact

criteria.name: inquiry_validation_names_fields

criteria.name: brand_band_exact_colors

criteria.name: display_type_scale_open_license

criteria.name: sidebar_shell_and_mobile_collapse

criteria.reasoning: yes - tested and verified working visually or via Playwright testing.

criteria.name: rounded_cards_and_pill_chips

criteria.name: section_rhythm_in_order

criteria.name: info_card_and_tile_exact_hexes

criteria.name: marquee_contrast_pairs_readable

criteria.name: three_tier_tokens_compute

criteria.name: specified_copy_exact_and_bilingual

criteria.name: placeholder_media_matches_reference_shapes

criteria.name: scratch_authored_media_inventory_craft

criteria.name: inquiry_shortlist_overlays_match_brand

criteria.name: mobile_menu_opens_with_four_nav_links

criteria.name: mobile_menu_close_restores_scroll_position

criteria.name: carousel_next_advances_one_slide

criteria.name: carousel_previous_returns_first_slide

criteria.name: carousel_resets_to_first_on_reload

criteria.name: consent_banner_appears_after_load

criteria.name: consent_dismiss_preserves_page_state

criteria.name: consent_reappears_after_reload

criteria.reasoning: yes - tested and verified working visually or via Playwright testing.

criteria.name: sidebar_nav_scrolls_in_page

criteria.name: book_cta_scrolls_or_noops_on_homepage

criteria.name: shortlist_flow_count_and_estimate

criteria.name: shortlist_undo_then_redo

criteria.name: booking_submit_export_flow
criteria.description: Booking and export flow: open Book your Studio, submit a valid create-inquiry body (full_name ≥2 chars, valid email, phone ≥10 digits, studio_tier Flex, move_in_month YYYY-MM current-or-future, privacy_consent checked); success shows Inquiry ready — export your packet; Export JSON has inquiry.studio_tier Flex, matching inquiry.full_name, and monthly_estimate_eur consistent with the shortlist; Copy packet shows a Copied confirmation.

criteria.name: import_round_trip_restores_session

criteria.name: faq_accordion_exclusive_expand

criteria.name: command_palette_flow

criteria.name: schema_rejection_flow_per_field

criteria.name: schema_invalid_import_rejected_flow

criteria.name: scroll_reveal_fade_rise_once

criteria.name: hover_shape_overlay_morph

criteria.name: non_marquee_motion_uses_inertial_easing

criteria.name: smooth_scroll_synced_reveals
